data.content:
Xcode
Xcode is a development environment used by the iOS Specialist for building projects.

iOS Specialist
iOS Specialist is responsible for building local projects in Xcode without EAS.

EAS
EAS refers to the Electronic App Store, which the iOS Specialist avoids when building local projects.

React Native
React Native is a framework used in conjunction with Expo by the iOS Specialist for developing applications.

Expo
Expo is a platform for building, deploying, and managing mobile apps using React Native.

GospIA
GospIA is an organization with a bundle ID of com.titanio.gospia.<SEP>GospIA is an application developed by contact703.

Bundle ID
The Bundle ID is a unique identifier for the GospIA application.

Backend-Specialist
The Backend-Specialist is responsible for Next.js and Supabase.

Next.js
Next.js is a React-based framework for building server-rendered applications.

Supabase
Supabase is a PostgreSQL database with GraphQL API support used by the Backend-Specialist.

Security-Guardian
The Security-Guardian performs weekly security audits.

Titanio iOS
Titanio iOS is a company with a team of iOS Specialists.

Y Combinator
Y Combinator (YC W2027) is a startup accelerator that has sent a "magic link" to contact@titaniofilms.com.

travado
travado is a character in the input text who mentions various programs and platforms for startups.

AWS Activate
AWS Activate is a program for startups that has accepted contact@titaniofilms.com.<SEP>AWS Activate is a program that provides resources and support for startups.

NVIDIA Inception
NVIDIA Inception is a program for startups that has rejected contact@titaniofilms.com due to a generic email address.<SEP>NVIDIA Inception is a program that provides resources and support for startups.

Google for Startups
Google for Startups is a program for startups that requires login.<SEP>Google for Startups is a program that provides resources and support for startups.

Microsoft for Startups
Microsoft for Startups is a program for startups that has sent a verification code to contact@titaniofilms.com.<SEP>Microsoft for Startups is a program that provides resources and support for startups.

Eduardo/Tiago
Eduardo/Tiago are individuals mentioned in the input text who need to access the email contact@titaniofilms.com.

99Freelas
99Freelas is a platform where proposals have been submitted by travado.

siriguejo
siriguejo is an individual mentioned in the input text who has sent proposals to 99Freelas.

titaniofilms
titaniofilms is a company that owns the email contact@titaniofilms.com.

99Freelas Platform
99Freelas is a platform where proposals have been submitted by travado.

contact@titaniofilms.com
NVIDIA Inception rejected contact@titaniofilms.com due to a generic email address.

ReactCodegen
ReactCodegen is an open-source tool that generates React Native code from C++ and Objective-C headers.

expo
Expo is a development framework for building cross-platform mobile applications.

Metro bundler
Metro bundler is a part of the Expo development framework that bundles and transpiles JavaScript code for mobile applications.

pod install
Pod install is a process used in iOS development to manage dependencies using CocoaPods.

xcodebuild archive
xcodebuild archive is a command-line tool that creates an archived version of the application for distribution on the App Store.

Apple Distribution
Apple Distribution is a digital certificate issued by Apple Inc. for signing iOS applications.

Titanio Squad
Titanio Squad is an organization that develops and maintains various software projects, including the GospIA iOS application.

iOS
iOS refers to a mobile operating system developed by Apple Inc.

GospIA iOS
Titanio Squad is responsible for developing and maintaining the GospIA iOS application.

Titanio Studio
Titanio Studio is a marketing agency focused on growth and marketing strategies.

Instagram
Instagram is a social media platform where users share photos, videos, and live streams.<SEP>Instagram is a popular social media platform used for personal and professional purposes.

Reels
Reels are short-form video clips shared on Instagram that can be up to 60 seconds long.

Growth Hacking
Growth Hacking refers to the practice of using creative and innovative strategies to promote a product or service, typically in a digital environment.

[NOME]
[NOME] is a placeholder for a specific name used in direct messages (DMs).

Direct Message
A direct message refers to a private conversation between users on the platform.

[squad]
[squad] is a team working at Titanio Studio, a marketing agency.

Titanio
Titanio is an organization that is testing the use of AI to manage social media accounts.<SEP>Titanio is an organization that employs the Especialista OpenClaw.

Tiago
Tiago is an individual who has approved copywriting efforts for the Titanio Studio.

Marketing Ninja
A Marketing Ninja is a role within an organization that focuses on marketing and advertising strategies.

Copywriter
A Copywriter is a professional responsible for writing engaging copy for advertisements, marketing materials, etc.

API Meta
API Meta is a software tool used to access and manage social media platforms such as Instagram.

Google
Google is an organization that provides various digital services including search engines, email services, etc.

Blog Content
The blog content by Google is referenced as familiar information to Tiago.

API Master
An API Master role is responsible for managing and validating APIs, which is related to the API Meta software tool.

Especialista OpenClaw da squad Titanio
The Especialista OpenClaw is a member of the Titanio squad.

Mac Mini arm64
The Mac Mini arm64 is a device used by the Especialista OpenClaw for work.

Darwin 24.6.0
Darwin 24.6.0 is software used by the Especialista OpenClaw on their Mac Mini.

Node v22.22.0
Node v22.22.0 is software used by the Especialista OpenClaw for development.

Workspace: /Volumes/TITA_039/MAC_MINI_03/.openclaw/workspace
The Workspace is a location where the Especialista OpenClaw stores their work files.

Agente: Tita (claude-sonnet-4-6)
Tita is an agent used by the Especialista OpenClaw for automation tasks.

Canais: WhatsApp (grupo Gospia: 120363405462114071@g.us)
The WhatsApp group "Gospia" is a communication channel used by the Especialista OpenClaw and others.

data.entity_name: NVIDIA Inception: rejeita email genérico (contact@) - usar email pessoal do fundador
data.content:
NVIDIA Inception: rejeita email genérico (contact@) - usar email pessoal do fundador
The rule states that NVIDIA Inception requires a personal email address of the founder to be used for communications.

data.entity_name: YC: magic link enviado para contact@titaniofilms.com - verificar email ANTES de iniciar
data.content:
YC: magic link enviado para contact@titaniofilms.com - verificar email ANTES de iniciar
The rule states that Y Combinator requires a verification of the email address before starting.

The rule states that all listed rules are important for Victor Capital.

World Athletics Federation
The World Athletics Federation is the governing body overseeing the World Athletics Championship and record validations.

Responsabilidades
The job duties listed are associated with the position of Victor Capital.

Programas Monitorados
Victor Capital monitors the programs provided by Sebrae, BNDES, and FINEP.<SEP>Victor Capital monitors the programs provided by Microsoft for Startups.<SEP>Victor Capital monitors the programs provided by Google for Startups.<SEP>Victor Capital monitors the programs provided by NVIDIA Inception.<SEP>Victor Capital monitors the programs provided by Y Combinator.<SEP>Victor Capital monitors the programs provided by AWS Activate.

Carbon-Fiber Spikes
Noah Carter used carbon-fiber spikes to enhance performance during the race.

Noah Carter
Noah Carter used carbon-fiber spikes to enhance performance during the race.

Apple Sign In
Apple Sign In is required if Google Sign In is used.

StoreKit
StoreKit is a payment system for in-app purchases on iOS, not using direct PIX payments.

Zica
Zica is an individual who creates an Apple Developer Account with Eduardo.

Eduardo
Eduardo is the other person who creates an Apple Developer Account with Zica.

Apple Developer Account
The Apple Developer Account costs $99 per year and is required for app development.

KidsHQ-HQ
KidsHQ-HQ is another application developed by contact703.

KidsHQ Kids Swift
KidsHQ Kids Swift is a version of the KidsHQ app built in Swift.

FamilyControls entitlement
The FamilyControls entitlement is required for certain apps and can be requested through Apple's Developer Account.

contact703
contact703 is a development company that has created several applications, including GospIA, KidsHQ-HQ, and KidsHQ Kids Swift.

GitHub repos
The GitHub repositories for contact703 include gospia-ios, kidshq-kids-ios, and kidshq-kids-swift.

tita-learning-system
The tita-learning-system is a system of learning that includes 21 lessons with a 90.5% success rate.

Gold Digger Studio
Gold Digger Studio is a Workana profile created by the user, siriguejo@proton.me.

Workana
Workana is a platform for freelancers and clients to connect and work together.

Drop Servicing
Drop servicing is a concept where the seller handles the customer service, while the buyer focuses on marketing and sales.

YouTube Faceless
The user has created a YouTube channel called "Gold Digger Studio" which uses faceless videos to promote their services.

memory-bot
The memory-bot is an AI system that helps with learning and retention of information.

ios-specialist
The ios-specialist is an expert in iOS, React Native, Expo, and App Store development.

money-maker
The money-maker is a concept that uses AI to generate revenue through various means.

agent-doctor
The agent-doctor is an expert in APIs, free and paid, as well as hardening macOS and criptografia age.

Sistema de Memória v2
The Sistema de Memória v2 is a system of learning that includes 59 lessons with a 96.6% success rate.

Noah Carter set a new 100m sprint record at the World Athletics Championship.

World Athletics Championship

Carbon-Fiber Spikes' Manufacturer
The manufacturer of Noah's carbon-fiber spikes contributed to his record-breaking performance.

OpenClaw
OpenClaw is an open-source platform for configuration, automation, and integration.

Tita
Tita is the agent principal running on a Mac Mini with OpenClaw.

/tmp/gospia-certs/
/tmp/gospia-certs/ is the directory for storing certificates.

Apple Team
The Apple Team has a provisioning profile with ID TY646U2BYX.

.openclaw/workspace/squad/specialists/ios-specialist/

6760674894
6760674894 is the App Store ID.

.openclaw/workspace/squad/
.openclaw/workspace/squad/ is the directory where squad workspaces are stored.

Mac Mini
Mac Mini is a computer model used by Tita for running OpenClaw.

Julian Goldie
Julian Goldie uses and advises on OpenClaw.

ClaWHub
ClaWHub is a platform for creating and sharing skills with OpenClaw.

GitHub
GitHub has repositories for the OpenClaw project.

Discord
Discord is a community for discussing OpenClaw.

whatsapp
WhatsApp is the target channel for the nclaw message send command.

nclaw message send
The nclaw message send command is a method for sending messages and media files using OpenClaw.

120363405462114071@g.us
This is the target number for the WhatsApp message.

SISTEMA-MEMORIA-APRENDIZADO.md
The media file being sent is a markdown document named SISTEMA-MEMORIA-APRENDIZADO.md.

/Volumes/TITA_039/MAC_MINI_03/.openclaw/workspace/SISTEMA-MEMORIA-APRENDIZADO.md
The media file is located in the specified directory on a Mac Mini computer.

Instaloader
Instaloader is a tool for downloading Instagram videos and other content.

yt-dlp
Yt-dlp is another tool used for downloading YouTube and other video content.<SEP>yt-dlp is a command-line YouTube video downloader.

instagram.com/p/SHORTCODE/
This is the URL of a specific Instagram video being downloaded using Instaloader or yt-dlp.

USER
The username for an Instagram account used with Instaloader to download content.

/Volumes/TITA_039/MAC_MINI_03/.openclaw/workspace
/Volumes/TITA_039/MAC_MINI_03/.openclaw/workspace is a directory path on a Mac Mini computer.

Playwright
The nclaw message send method and Playwright are compared as tools for sending messages and media.<SEP>Playwright is a browser automation framework used for automating web browsers.

Dashboard Testing
Dashboard testing refers to the evaluation and verification of various aspects of the dashboard, including its functionality, user interface, and performance.

API Endpoints
API endpoints are the entry points to interact with the API, allowing clients to send requests and receive responses.

Health Status
Health status refers to the state of the system or application, indicating whether it is functioning correctly or experiencing issues.

Squad
Squad refers to a group of specialists or experts working together on a project or task.

Openclaw Models
Openclaw models are a set of pre-trained AI models used for various tasks, including image classification and object detection.

Anthropic Claude Haiku 4-5-20251001
Anthropic Claude Haiku 4-5-20251001 is a specific openclaw model used for text generation and poetry composition.

Moonshot Kimi K2 Turbo Preview
Moonshot Kimi K2 Turbo Preview is another openclaw model used for various tasks, including image classification and object detection.

Nemotron 3 Super 120b A12b:free
Nemotron 3 Super 120b A12b:free is an openclaw model that has been tested successfully.

Nemotron
Nemotron is an openclaw model used for various tasks.

Instagram Poster Specialist
An Instagram poster specialist is a professional who creates posters for Instagram.

Context Transfer
The context transfer functionality was evaluated using various openclaw models, demonstrating their ability to exchange data and perform tasks.<SEP>The context transfer functionality was evaluated using various openclaw models.

Sistema
The Sistema is a system that is fully operational and real, not a simulation.

Conclusão
The Conclusão refers to a conclusion or final outcome, which was reached after testing the Sistema.

100% Operacional e Real
The Sistema is confirmed to be 100% operacional and real.
